findings.title: Mono Registry Pattern Analysis
findings.description: Studied three Registry implementations: SlashCommandRegistry (TUI commands), PlatformRegistry (IM platforms), FileTemplateRegistry (prompt templates). All follow similar Map-based pattern.

findings.title: Mono vs OpenClaw Skills Architecture Comparison
findings.description: Mono has 3-layer (builtin/global/project), OpenClaw has 1-layer global only. Mono more flexible with YAML frontmatter + block scalar.

findings.title: Mono vs OpenClaw Session Management Comparison
findings.description: Mono uses JSONL with branch support (headId), OpenClaw uses SQLite. Mono's git-like branch model more sophisticated.
